title: Validation Stage 08 Mutation Tests
scientificQuestion: Can the Receipt-Stable Descriptor Residual Candidate survive an internal-independent validation gauntlet without outside-party reviewer feedback?
limitations: Synthetic reviewer roles are internal simulations and not outside-party feedback.

disclaimer: Bounded internal-independent computational validation. No outside-party reviewer feedback, uptake, prize-level claim, broad autonomous-intelligence claim, medical/legal/wet-lab capability, hazardous capability, or universal validity is claimed.
